name: pay_probes
description: Broke-player E2E for the three balance-gated purchase rails (TODO 1.B pay-probes, closing the runtime check): Deka's 500 CD Magikarp at the Sango pond (2570 111 2856), Pondwarden Tayo's 150 CD Waterside Invitational entry at the Sango waterside (2542 108 2954), and Overseer Rong's 150 CD escorted-exit fee on the Hua Zhan greenhouse catwalk (1541.5 101 2108.5). Each rail is played twice: wallet zeroed -> click -> refusal actionbar + non-delivery (tag absent / berry absent / balance still $ 0), then wallet set to 700 -> click -> delivery + exact remainder via cobbledollars query (700 keeps every post-fee remainder under 1000, where query is exact — it K-abbreviates above). No battles anywhere (the bracket is paid into, never fought). ASSUMES badges < 2 (guard-asserted at beat 3: Rong's post_badge_2 entry at priority 15 would replace the catwalk_hail shakedown and its pay button); the preamble strips derby + bracket state that would preempt the purchase entries (sango_classic leaves sango_classic_champion, which hides Deka's karp button) and empties the party so the delivered Magikarp is the only mon. Run leaves the wallet at 550 and the Magikarp + berry with the player (preamble handles the re-run).

steps.comment: -- reset (idempotent re-runs): the two purchase tags + the berry the karp sale grants --

-- dead-letter defense: a prior sango_classic run leaves sango_classic_champion (or a live quarter leaves classic_active) — both outrank Deka's default entry, and only the default entry carries the karp button. Mirror sango_classic's own preamble clock reset. --
-- bracket defense: defeated_sq_bracket_2/3 flip Tayo to final_round/champion entries, hiding the signup-desk pay button --
-- party emptied: the funded karp buy then delivers into slot 1 (no battles in this scenario, so an empty party is safe; all three beats sit in town safe zones) --
-- beat 1 BROKE: Deka at the pond — 500 CD growth vehicle refused on an empty wallet --

broke path: buy_karp's #karp_ok pay-probe reads 0, every delivery line under the gate is skipped, and the button has no close — the karp_pitch page stays up. The refusal is an actionbar title (overlay kind).

steps.wait_chat: does not leave the lot on credit

steps.comment: party transcript evidence (no rcon party read exists): emptied in the preamble, must still be empty — the mon, tag, and berry all hang off the same #karp_ok gate in buy_karp.mcfunction
-- beat 1 FUNDED: 700 CD in, same button — delivery (mon + berry + tag) and the exact 200 remainder --

the buy button's gated open_dialog (gate bought_magikarp, evaluated after the function ran) should now land on karp_handoff; if this expect flakes, the gate-eval-after-command race is the suspect — the purchase asserts above already passed
-- beat 2 BROKE: Pondwarden Tayo's signup desk — 150 CD entry refused on an empty wallet --

steps.wait_chat: cannot take an entry it cannot bank

steps.comment: -- beat 2 FUNDED: 700 CD in, entry lands (invit_entered), 550 remains, and the desk flips to the in_bracket standing entry --

-- beat 3 BROKE: Overseer Rong on the greenhouse catwalk — 150 CD escorted exit refused. GUARD first: with badges_gte_2 her post_badge_2 entry (priority 15) replaces catwalk_hail and the pay button is gone; fail here, diagnosably, not at the expect. --

the tp crosses the catwalk reveal volume: on a player without wheat_named the one-time THE WORD IS WHEAT title + tellraw fire (harmless — no actionbar, no overlay-kind collision; tags wheat_named/heard_wheat_pitch/toured_greenhouse land and are NOT this scenario's to reset)
exit_fee has no item/tag payload — the sink's non-delivery IS the refusal line plus the untouched zero balance (remove never ran; pay-probe read 0)
-- beat 3 FUNDED: 700 CD in, the fee clears — Escorted out + exactly 550 left --
